narrative:
North Canton 4-B (precinct in Stark County) has 1,007 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
